assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 12 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Brett Guthrie. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
